summary: Tested P0 bug fix for Add to Picks functionality in PersonalizedPicksPanel. Bug is FIXED - products can now be successfully added from ProductDetailModal to mini-cart and sent to concierge.

minor.issue: Returns 404 in console but still works - may need investigation

console_errors.issue: ReferenceError: setIsLoading is not defined at line 212418

action_items: Investigate and fix 'setIsLoading is not defined' error in MiraDemoPage.jsx - occurs when opening PersonalizedPicksPanel
Investigate 404 errors for some API endpoints in console logs
critical_code_review_comments: The bug fix appears complete - onAddToPicks callback is properly passed and handled
There is a separate error 'setIsLoading is not defined' that occurs when opening the picks panel but doesn't block functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for Add to Picks in PersonalizedPicksPanel is verified working. Full flow tested: Login -> Open PersonalizedPicksPanel -> Click product -> Click 'Add to Picks' -> Product appears in mini-cart with checkmark -> Click 'Send to My Concierge' -> Confirmation modal shows -> Confirm -> Success message displayed.

tested_flows.notes: Login works correctly with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123
Clicking 'Personalized picks for Mojo' card opens panel. Note: setIsLoading error in console but doesn't block

tested_flows.flow: Click catalogue product to open ProductDetailModal
tested_flows.notes: Product card click opens modal correctly
Button correctly shows 'Add to Picks' not 'Add to Cart'
Product is added to mini-cart, shown with checkmark, count shows '1'
Mini-cart at bottom shows item count and 'Send to My Concierge' button
Confirmation modal shows selected items, Confirm sends successfully
Mira confirms 'Your 1 personalized picks for Mojo have been sent to your Concierge'

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug report mentioned products not being added from ProductDetailModal. Based on code review and testing, the fix appears to be in place - the onAddToPicks callback is properly passed from PersonalizedPicksPanel (line 1046-1049) to ProductDetailModal, and handleAddToCart in ProductCard.jsx (line 834-847) correctly checks for and calls onAddToPicks. The bug may have been fixed in a previous iteration or the test conditions are now met.
